questions.question: Which organizations provide the AI models used to serve Notion AI to customers?

options.text: Google and Microsoft

questions.question: What is the primary design purpose of Notion's AI models and tools?

options.text: To make automated decisions on individuals
options.explanation: Notion explicitly states their models are not designed to make automated decisions on individuals.

options.text: To support customers in doing their work faster
options.explanation: The models are designed to support customers in doing their work, faster.

options.text: To replace human decision-making entirely
options.explanation: Notion AI is a tool to support work, not to replace human decision-making.

options.text: To analyze employee performance metrics
options.explanation: The models are designed to support customers in doing their work, faster.

questions.question: What contractual obligation do all subprocessors agree to regarding customer data?

options.text: They can use data to improve their own unrelated products
options.explanation: We require all subprocessors to agree to contractual obligations that prohibit any use of customer data to train their models.

options.text: They must agree not to use customer data to train their models

options.explanation: We require all subprocessors to agree to contractual obligations that prohibit any use of customer data to train their models.

options.text: They must use data only for the purpose of providing Notion AI features

questions.question: What is a benefit of participating in the AI LEAP Program?

options.text: You get a discount on your subscription
options.explanation: The AI LEAP Program allows for sharing of workspace data to improve underlying models in exchange for front-of-line access to future AI improvements.

options.text: You get front-of-line access to future AI improvements
options.explanation: The AI LEAP Program allows for sharing of workspace data to improve underlying models in exchange for front-of-line access to future AI improvements and features.
